I've hit a permission restriction on running ffprobe. However, I can provide you with the file list from the directory. Here's what I found:

## File List in `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/main/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/media/videos/`:

1. `.DS_Store`
2. `020926_INT-M_077_FullStoryRecutNoEndCard_KP_VIDEO_Meta_TRT_9x16.mp4` (90 MB)
3. `hero-trt-vial-with-text--dt.webm` (420 KB)
4. `hero-trt-vial-with-text.webp` (12 KB)
5. `mopt_hero-vial-with-text.webm` (299 KB)
6. `mopt_review-1.webm` (1.2 MB)
7. `mopt_review-2.webm` (1.7 MB)
8. `mopt_review-3.webm` (794 KB)
9. `review-vid-1--dt.webm` (1.6 MB)
10. `review-vid-1.webp` (11 KB)
11. `review-vid-2--dt.webm` (2.4 MB)
12. `review-vid-2.webp` (14 KB)
13. `review-vid-3--dt.webm` (1.0 MB)

17. `wopt_hero-vial-with-text.webm` (2.0 MB)
18. `wopt_hero-vial-with-text.webp` (15 KB)

## Key Findings:

- **mopt_review webm files exist**: mopt_review-1.webm, mopt_review-2.webm, and mopt_review-3.webm all exist
- **review-vid-4.webp exists**: ✓ Confirmed

Unfortunately, I cannot run ffprobe directly due to permission restrictions on executing arbitrary commands. To get the video resolution, you would need to run this command yourself:

```bash
ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width,height -of csv=p=0 /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/main/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/media/videos/mopt_review-1.webm
```

Or if you have ffmpeg installed, you can also use:
```bash
ffmpeg -i /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/main/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/media/videos/mopt_review-1.webm 2>&1 | grep -i "video\|dimension"
```
